name: עדכון רשימת שיעורים

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'shiurim/**'
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  build-list:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Generate list.json
        run: |
          python3 - << 'EOF'
          import json, os
          folder = 'shiurim'
          files = []
          if os.path.isdir(folder):
              files = sorted(f for f in os.listdir(folder) if f.lower().endswith(('.mp3', '.m4a')))
          with open('list.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as out:
              json.dump(files, out, ensure_ascii=False, indent=1)
          print(f'נמצאו {len(files)} שיעורים')
          EOF

      - name: Commit list.json
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add list.json
          git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "עדכון אוטומטי של רשימת השיעורים"
          git push
